reasoning: The sword sprite itself is well within the Echoes-tuned palette: warm parchment golds and burnt oranges dominate the blade, a saturated teal/cyan accent at the guard provides a harmonious complementary hue, and the shadow pixels on the blade use warm amber-brown darks rather than pure black — all strong positives. Palette compatibility with the reference swatches is high (matches the sunset-orange and teal-sky columns directly). However, three of the four showcase panels use a near-black charcoal background that is cold and achromatic, which conflicts with the 'shadows are colored darks, NEVER pure black/grey' directive and drags the overall image mood toward grim/cold. The rightmost panel on cream/parchment background shows the ideal presentation context. Score reflects the sprite quality being solid but the image as presented violating the no-cold-grey-black constraint across most of its area.
